{{CargoRelic
|name=Homunculus
|class_id=20979
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=The Book of Natural Philosophy once recorded that alchemists would mix human blood, horse manure, and various herbs in a flask, stirring them evenly before sealing it. After fermenting for forty days, a new species in the shape of a human would appear inside the flask. This being would then need to be nurtured with a secret elixir made from human blood, eventually resulting in a Homunculus that is indistinguishable from a human.
|fame=29
|art=15
|fth=15
|civ=17
|tech=14
|ss1=Per 5 Apostles defeated, Snail ATK +50<br>Apostles Defeated: 15/15
|ss2=Per 5 Apostles defeated, Snail ATK +50<br>Apostles Defeated: 15/15
|ss3=Per 5 Apostles defeated, Snail ATK +50<br>Apostles Defeated: 15/15
|ss4=Per 5 Apostles defeated, Snail ATK +50<br>Apostles Defeated: 15/15
|ss7=Per 5 Apostles defeated, Snail ATK +50<br>Apostles Defeated: 15/15<br> (Awakened)
}}
